name: BankAmericard Secured Credit Card
effective_cost: Free, with no annual fee, but earns nothing and requires a refundable $200–$5,000 deposit

verdict.text: No rewards, no intro APR: other secured BofA cards earn for free

earn_note: This is the secured version of BankAmericard, and it inherits the same no-rewards structure. But secured card products also aren't eligible for BankAmericard's signature 0% intro APR offer, so there's no APR-focused reason to pick this over the unsecured card either. There's no earn-rate or APR reason to choose this over Cash Rewards Secured or Unlimited Cash Rewards Secured, which cost the same to open.

points.note: Nothing to redeem. Value is purely the credit-building mechanism, not any earning.

transfer_partners.highlight: No rewards program, nothing to transfer.

insurance.detail: Not responsible for fraudulent transactions once reported
Not publicly documented for this card
Not publicly documented for this card
Not publicly documented for this card

protection_note: No purchase-protection or extended-warranty guide published for this card.
rental_note: No auto rental coverage documented publicly for this card.

services.name: Standard APR
services.detail: 25.99% variable. Secured card products aren't eligible for an introductory APR or a new-account bonus offer of any kind.

services.name: Deposit review for return
services.detail: Bank of America periodically reviews your account and, based on credit history, may qualify you to have your deposit returned; not guaranteed for all customers.

additional_cards.title: Additional cards

benefits.text: Their activity is reported to the credit bureaus too, on the same account
No rewards earned: this card has no rewards program to share

additional_cards.note: Free to add, and since this account reports to the credit bureaus, an authorized user can benefit from the payment history even though there's no rewards program to share.
